title: wedelia penninervia
intro: Wedelia penninervia, also known as Mexican daisy or Wedelia, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia penninervia include reducing fever, treating digestive problems, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Wedelia penninervia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
